document_type.description: Type of document, for example neonatal discharge summary or progress note.

gestational_age.description: Gestational age as written, for example 34 weeks.

birth_weight.description: Birth weight exactly as written, including units if present.

current_weight.description: Current or discharge weight exactly as written, including units if present.

delivery_details.description: Delivery mode and related birth details.

diagnoses.description: List of diagnoses or major problems.

clinical_summary.description: Short summary of the clinical course or progress.

examination_findings.description: System examination findings or general exam notes.

investigations.description: Tests and results as plain text entries.

treatments.description: Medicines, supportive care, and procedures as plain text entries.

feeding_and_support.description: Feeding plan and supportive care such as KMC, oxygen, phototherapy, EBM.

discharge_plan.description: Discharge status, follow-up plan, and destination.

raw_notes.description: Any extra handwritten content that does not fit elsewhere.
